prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility patterns for NFLX (approximately 35-40% annualized), I estimated an 18-day standard deviation of about 3.5%. The point estimate assumes minimal drift over the short 18-day period. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions: 50% CI uses ±0.67 standard deviations, 80% CI uses ±1.28 standard deviations, and 90% CI uses ±1.65 standard deviations from the current price.
